overview: Brinjal Fresh Store is a customer-facing PWA for ordering fresh vegetables and fruits. Customers browse products, select quantities, and place orders with Cash on Delivery. The admin panel (hidden, password-protected) manages products, orders, discounts, delivery timing, and customer profiles.
features: Hero banner with full-background vegetable images and premium Zepto/Blinkit-style styling
Rotating slides: Min order, Free Delivery, Delivery Timing, Discount, custom slides
Admin can add/remove custom hero banner slides
Customer profiles displayed in numbered sequence in admin panel
Order timestamps shown in admin Orders tab for easy delivery scheduling
Product rows grouped by category (Vegetables, Leafy, Combo, Fruits) - horizontally scrollable
Cart with auto-applied discounts (percentage, flat amount, free item on order)
Anonymous checkout - name, phone, address only
PWA with custom Brinjal Fresh logo
Admin panel: Products, Orders, Delivery, Discount, Profiles, Settings, Hero Banner tabs
